allowed_thesis_wording: Nominal Salt1-4 rows define the intended training envelope but are not fit-enabled until source/property release passes.
forbidden_use: Do not fit or select from nominal rows while source/property policy blocks them.

allowed_thesis_wording: Support rows can explain development history or blocker localization only.
forbidden_use: Do not call support rows blind holdout or use them for final model selection.

allowed_thesis_wording: Salt2 +/-5Q rows are blind holdout/testing rows after a frozen candidate exists.
forbidden_use: Do not tune, refit, source-select, or model-select using holdout rows.

allowed_thesis_wording: val_salt2 is external-test evidence after freeze and external-ledger release.
forbidden_use: Do not back-propagate external-test residuals into model form or candidate selection.

allowed_thesis_wording: PM10 rows are future score-only holdouts after terminal/admission gates and freeze.
forbidden_use: Do not fit, tune, or select from PM10 rows.

allowed_thesis_wording: New CFD is future external or holdout evidence only after run/admission and freeze.
forbidden_use: Do not include planned CFD in current score or model selection.
